creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Roman,

I think your patch is not needed.  Yesod 1.2 has merged the
functionality of yesod-default [1] into yesod [2] -- hence git-annex
should just work by using that package only.  I have created a patch
for fixing this up in git-annex package description [3] (*) I believe
that is the way of resolving the situation, but I have not yet come to
test it properly.

I will come back to the dynamic linking issue after that.

(*) Note that the dependency on yesod-default is present for the
4.20130709 version.

[1] http://hackage.haskell.org/package/yesod-default
[2] http://hackage.haskell.org/package/yesod
[3] https://raw.github.com/freebsd-haskell/ports/master/devel/hs-git-annex/files/patch-git-annex.cabal
